purpose: Smoke-tests that oci-sweeper invokes the right KG queries, references the correct FAR Subpart 9.5 taxonomy, and produces a structured OCI sweep envelope with per-finding mitigation classes.

evals.prompt: Scan this workspace for OCI risk. The incumbent on the predecessor contract is one of our partners on this bid.
expectations: calls kg_entities with types including 'company' or 'incumbent' or 'subcontractor'
calls kg_query for relationships involving partner / incumbent entities
envelope contains findings[] with at least one finding tagged class='impaired_objectivity'
each finding has a mitigation_recommendation referencing FAR 9.504 or 9.505
envelope contains coverage_summary with counts for unequal_access / impaired_objectivity / biased_ground_rules

evals.prompt: Sweep for OCI: one of the customer's KO support contractors is also a teaming partner we listed.
expectations: envelope flags biased_ground_rules class for customer-support / partner overlap
finding cites FAR 9.505-1 OR 9.505-2 in citation field
no fabricated FAR sections (only Subpart 9.5 references)

evals.prompt: Did our prior work on a related agency contract give us unequal access to non-public information that biases this bid?
expectations: envelope contains at least one finding with class='unequal_access'
finding references FAR 9.505-4 in citation field
envelope has overall_risk_level field set to one of: low, medium, high
every finding has a chunk_id OR entity_name traceability field (no ungrounded claims)

evals.name: Grounding-audit floor
evals.prompt: Scan this workspace for OCI risk. The incumbent on the predecessor contract is one of our partners on this bid.
expectations: tools/audit_skill_grounding.py --skill oci-sweeper reports grounding_ratio >= 0.90 (OCI sweep is FAR-citation-heavy; the on-disk JSON envelope source_chunks are the citation-of-record, the chat narrative is the human-readable digest).
tools/audit_skill_grounding.py reports claims_exempt is at least 0.40 of (claims_total + claims_exempt).
No regression below 0.7 across at least three consecutive runs of the same prompt.
expected_signals: tools/audit_skill_grounding.py --skill oci-sweeper reports grounding_ratio >= 0.90 (OCI sweep is FAR-citation-heavy; the on-disk JSON envelope source_chunks are the citation-of-record, the chat narrative is the human-readable digest).
tools/audit_skill_grounding.py reports claims_exempt is at least 0.40 of (claims_total + claims_exempt).
No regression below 0.7 across at least three consecutive runs of the same prompt.
anti_signals: grounding_ratio drops below the per-skill floor of 0.90
the skill emits OCI findings without citing the FAR 9.5 sub-clause that triggered the class
the skill confuses the three OCI classes (biased ground rules vs. unequal access vs. impaired objectivity)
